_env_notes.META_AD_ACCOUNT_ID: Facebook Ad Account ID (without act_ prefix)
_env_notes.SHOPIFY_CLIENT_ID: Shopify app client ID for client_credentials grant
_env_notes.GHL_API_KEY: Go High Level API Bearer token
_env_notes.GHL_LOCATION_ID: GHL Location ID (PIT token from location key)
_env_notes.CRON_SECRET: Shared secret for cron endpoint auth
